commands.review_summary:
Threads the approval-time session UUID and session-store template through exec approval followup dispatch, adds an optional gateway agent request field plus Swift protocol model update, and drops stale gateway/direct followups with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main routes exec approval followups by sessionKey while /new and /reset regenerate the mapped sessionId, and the PR body provides before/after loopback gateway logs for approved and denied pending approvals after reset.
